# Ignore native methods for Perfetto SDK for ravenwood.
# Ensure this is updated when new native methods are added.
class com.android.internal.dev.perfetto.sdk.PerfettoCategories keepclass
class com.android.internal.dev.perfetto.sdk.PerfettoTrace keepclass
    method native_get_process_track_uuid ignore
    method native_get_thread_track_uuid ignore
    method native_activate_trigger ignore
    method native_register ignore
    method native_start_session ignore
    method native_stop_session @native_stop_session$ravenwood
class com.android.internal.dev.perfetto.sdk.PerfettoTrace.Category
    method native_init ignore
    method native_delete ignore
    method native_register ignore
    method native_unregister ignore
    method native_is_enabled ignore
    method isEnabled ignore # return false
